allow: Bash(git -C /c/projects/drama-radar add .gitignore CLAUDE.md next.config.js package.json package-lock.json postcss.config.js tailwind.config.js tsconfig.json wrangler.toml)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''  {a[slug]} \({a[author]}\) - {EXCLUSIVE if a[isExclusive] else } {FEATURED if a[isFeatured] else }''''\) for a in d[''''articles'''']]; print\(f''''Total: {d[total]}''''\)")
